name: Tonosama Gekomon

signature_move.name: Kobushi Tone
signature_move.description: Causes the enemy's configuration data to vibrate using the ultra-low frequency waves from its vocals and horns, destroying them.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese An upgraded version of Gekomon with an antenna resembling the chonmage of a feudal lord. The upgrade is said to have first occurred in a karaoke grading system. It plays a melody from the two horns extending from its shoulders, and its singing voice, which is several octave s below that of Gekomon's, imparts a feeling of a lordly air of superiority (?). Its Special Move is causing the enemy's configuration data to vibrate using the ultra-low frequency waves from its vocals and horns, destroying them ( Kobushi Tone ). However, depending on the opponent, their physical condition may end up improving due to the low frequency waves.
